overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a player walking through a rainy grassland toward grazing horses, then entering and wading through a river. The footage features high-quality cinematic rendering with heavy rainfall, overcast lighting, and detailed natural environments characteristic of modern open-world games.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy grassland trail with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a muddy path through tall grass toward animals visible on the hillside ahead

notable_agents.action: group of horses grazing on the grassy hillside in the distance

entered.detail: muddy path winding through tall green grass and vegetation
lush green slope rising on the left side of the path
lush green slope rising on the right side of the path
large deciduous tree with drooping branches on the left side
brown horse grazing on the hillside ahead
white horse standing on the hillside near the brown horse

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a muddy trail through a rainy grassland. Tall green hills flank both sides of the path while scattered trees dot the landscape. In the distance, a brown horse and white horse graze on the hillside as heavy rain falls steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: close encounter with horses on the trail

events.description: brown horse walks across the path from right to left, temporarily blocking the way

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path, passing closely by the grazing horses on either side

notable_agents.action: brown horse grazing on the left side of the path, then crossing in front
white horse standing on the right grassy bank, watching the camera pass

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes closely by the horses, with the brown horse crossing the path from right to left. The white horse remains on the right bank as the camera continues toward a river visible ahead. The rain continues to fall heavily, reducing visibility slightly.

events.description: entering the river water, transitioning from walking on land to wading through water

agents.ego_description: wading through the river water, moving forward with the current while observing the riverbanks

entered.detail: murky brown river water with visible current and ripples from rain
large boulder partially submerged in the river near the entry point
steep muddy bank with exposed roots and grass on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the river, submerging partially as it moves through the water. The dirt path and horses are left behind as the perspective shifts to traveling through the river valley. Large rocks and eroded muddy banks line the river, with trees overhanging from the right side as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy grassland that gradually transitions into a submerged trek through a river valley. It begins by walking along a muddy trail flanked by tall green hills and scattered trees, with a brown and white horse grazing in the distance under a steady downpour. As the camera advances, it passes closely by the horses, with the brown horse crossing the path from right to left while the white horse remains on the bank. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the dirt path behind and enters the river, partially submerging as it wades through the current. Finally, the perspective moves deeper into the valley, passing large rocks and eroded muddy banks beneath overhanging trees as the heavy rain continues to fall.
